home.bio: I am an iOS and Frontend Developer passionate about turning ideas into high-impact digital products. With a strong dedication to solving complex problems and crafting exceptional interfaces, I always strive to build applications that bring real value to people's lives.

brotto.tagline: Local plant care: photos and logs without servers
brotto.description: Brotto is a plant monitoring app that keeps your photos and watering logs safely on your private device.

footer.bio: Frontend & iOS Developer passionate about creating valuable solutions and high-quality crafting to make a positive impact.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Brotto
privacy.intro: Welcome to Brotto. Your privacy is a priority for us. This policy explains how we handle information in the Brotto app, focused on tracking plant evolution through photos and journals.
privacy.section1Intro: Brotto is designed to collect the minimum data necessary to function properly. The collected data is used exclusively for App Functionality and Analytics for Improvement, as detailed below:
privacy.s1p1: Identifiers: We collect anonymous user and device IDs to differentiate unique accesses and ensure your settings are maintained.
privacy.s1p2: Purchase History: We collect transaction information (Brotto Pro) to validate and unlock unlimited features on your device.
privacy.s1p3: Product Usage: We collect anonymous interaction data (such as button clicks and views) to understand which features are most useful and improve the user experience.
privacy.section2Title: 2. Local Processing of Photos and Content
privacy.s2p1: Your plants and your photos belong to you. All evolution photos, plant names, and journal logs you add to Brotto are stored locally on your device and/or in your personal iCloud. The developer does not have access to your photos or plant names on external servers.
privacy.section3Intro: To offer a high-quality experience, we rely on the following partners who process data securely:
privacy.s3p1: RevenueCat: Used to manage subscriptions and in-app purchases. It processes the transaction ID to ensure you have access to Pro features. Privacy of RevenueCat.
privacy.s3p2: TelemetryDeck: Used for anonymous usage analysis. TelemetryDeck does not collect personally identifiable information (PII). Privacy of TelemetryDeck.
privacy.s3p3: Apple: Payment processing is handled exclusively by the Apple App Store. We do not have access to your credit card data or sensitive financial information.
privacy.s4p1: No Ads: Brotto does not display third-party advertisements.
privacy.s4p2: No Tracking: We do not track your activity across other companies' apps or websites. We do not sell your data to data brokers or advertising networks.
privacy.s5p1: In accordance with LGPD and GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your data. As most data is stored locally, you can delete your information simply by removing plants from the app or uninstalling the application.
privacy.s6p1:
If you have questions regarding this policy, please contact:
Felipe Casalecchi
